TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu mslyaw pilaw nya Amuy hiya. milaw sa tuqiy ga. smyax balay, minilaw nya tuqi osa ngasal qasa ga. slwan balay. pinilaw nya qhuniq qasa ga cyux sazing bhut, plagan nya kabang nya, aki hmkangi nniqun te kabang nya, ini nya 'lwi, kyalun nya Ayun mha, plagi cikay kabang mu, kmal Ayun mha, aw plagay mu. ppilaw cikay pilaw su kmal Amuy, spilaw nya kabang na Amuy teta 'lwan nniqun ma.
S.PHON: βniru:s~ɕaβi noβu ms~ɕljaw pilaw nja amuj ħija. milaw s~ɕa tuqij ɣa. s~ɕmjax βalaj, minilaw nja tuqi os~ɕa ŋas~ɕal qas~ɕa ɣa. s~ɕlwan βalaj. pinilaw nja qħuniq qas~ɕa ɣa ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕaziŋ βħut, plaɣan nja kaβaŋ nja, aki ħmkaŋi nniqun te kaβaŋ nja, ini nja ʔlwi, kjalun nja ajun mħa, plaɣi ʦ~ʨikaj kaβaŋ mu, kmal ajun mħa, aw plaɣaj mu. ppilaw ʦ~ʨikaj pilaw s~ɕu kmal amuj, s~ɕpilaw nja kaβaŋ na amuj teta ʔlwan nniqun ma.
S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu mslyaw pilaw nya Amuy hiya. milaw sa tuqiy ga. smyax balay, minilaw nya tuqi osa ngasal qasa ga. slwan balay. pinilaw nya qhuniq qasa ga cyux sazing bhut, plagan nya kabang nya, aki hmkangi nniqun te kabang nya, ini nya 'lwi, kyalun nya Ayun mha, plagi cikay kabang mu, kmal Ayun mha, aw plagay mu. ppilaw cikay pilaw su kmal Amuy, spilaw nya kabang na Amuy teta 'lwan nniqun ma.
S.PHON: βniru:s~ɕaβi noβu ms~ɕljaw pilaw nja amuj ħija. milaw s~ɕa tuqij ɣa. s~ɕmjax βalaj, minilaw nja tuqi os~ɕa ŋas~ɕal qas~ɕa ɣa. s~ɕlwan βalaj. pinilaw nja qħuniq qas~ɕa ɣa ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕaziŋ βħut, plaɣan nja kaβaŋ nja, aki ħmkaŋi nniqun te kaβaŋ nja, ini nja ʔlwi, kjalun nja ajun mħa, plaɣi ʦ~ʨikaj kaβaŋ mu, kmal ajun mħa, aw plaɣaj mu. ppilaw ʦ~ʨikaj pilaw s~ɕu kmal amuj, s~ɕpilaw nja kaβaŋ na amuj teta ʔlwan nniqun ma.
